data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_PCSt: That PC-based POKéMON storage\nsystem...\pWhoever made it must be some kind\nof a scientific wizard!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Oran: When my POKéMON ate an\nORAN BERRY, it regained HP!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Many: There are many types of POKéMON.\pAll types have their strengths and\nweaknesses against other types.\pDepending on the types of POKéMON,\na battle could be easy or hard.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Tree:
For example, your TREECKO is a
GRASS type.\pIt's strong against the WATER and
GROUND types.\pBut, it's weak against FIRE-type
POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Torc:
For example, your TORCHIC is a
FIRE type.\pIt's strong against the GRASS and
BUG types.\pBut, it's weak against WATER-type
POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Mudk: For example, your MUDKIP is a\nWATER type.\pIt's strong against the FIRE type.\pBut, it's weak against GRASS-type\nand ELECTRIC-type POKéMON.
